info.title: Venus Protocol API
info.description: API to support the Venus Protocol with data indexed from on chain activity

parameters.name: proposalId
parameters.description: Proposal Id for fetching a detailed proposal

get.description: Get vote summary for a given proposal, includes sums of for, against, abstain and total votes.
Retrieve a summary of an account's voter profile.

200.description: A summary of an account's voter profile including latest governance transactions.

get.description: Retrieve the history of proposals a given account has voted on

200.description: Array of proposals in which the given account has voted

get.description: Query voter accounts ordered by votes.

200.description: Returns an array of voter accounts ordered by votes

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: vToken address to fetch history for.

parameters.name: chainId
parameters.description: Chain ID of the network to query history for.

get.description: Fetch an array of daily snapshots of supply and borrow totals and supply and borrow apy over the previous 365 days for a given asset.

200.description: Returns historical data for the requested asset.

parameters.name: chainId
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of chain IDs to filter results. If omitted, all chains are included.

get.description: Returns the total value locked by all markets in the requested chains.

200.description: Returns the TVL data for the requested chains.

parameters.name: accept-version
parameters.description: Selects the API version. `stable` (default) requires `chainId` and returns a top-level `tokens` array. `next` supports cross-chain queries and embeds token data inside each market as `underlyingTokenMetadata`.

parameters.name: chainId
parameters.description: [stable] **Required.** [next] Optional. Blockchain chain ID to filter results.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: [both] Columns to sort by. Default is descending. Prepend `+` for ascending (e.g. `+underlyingName`).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: [both] Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: accountAddress
parameters.description: [next only] Account address to embed personalised Prime APY boosts into each market.

get.description:
Returns market data for listed markets, optionally filterable by asset address, name, symbol, underlying address, underlying name or underlying symbol.

**Versioning** (controlled via `accept-version` header):
- `stable` (default): `chainId` is **required**. Response includes a top-level `tokens` array of `TokenMetadata` objects. Markets include `rewardsDistributors` and `pointsDistributions`.
- `next`: `chainId` is optional for cross-chain queries. Token metadata is embedded inside each market as `underlyingTokenMetadata` with nested `tokenPrices`. Supports `accountAddress` for Prime APY data. No top-level `tokens` field.

200.description: Returns Market data for all listed markets.

stable.summary: accept-version: stable — paginated markets + top-level tokens array

next.summary: accept-version: next — token metadata embedded in each market, no top-level tokens

parameters.name: accept-version
parameters.description: Selects the API version. `stable` (default) requires `chainId` and returns a paginated list with embedded markets and a top-level `tokens` array. `next` supports multi-chain queries and returns pools grouped by chainId with markets in a separate paginated block.

parameters.name: chainId
parameters.description: [stable] **Required.** [next] Optional; accepts a JSON array string for multi-chain queries (e.g. `["56","1"]`).

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: [both] Columns to sort by. Default is descending. Prepend `+` for ascending (e.g. `+name`).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: [both] Maximum number of results to return.

get.description:
Returns pool data for all listed pools, optionally filterable by the pool's comptroller address.

**Versioning** (controlled via `accept-version` header):
- `stable` (default): `chainId` is **required**. Returns a paginated list of pools with embedded markets (filtered to `isListed: true`) and a top-level `tokens` array of `TokenMetadata`.
- `next`: `chainId` is optional; accepts a JSON array string for multi-chain queries (e.g. `["56","1"]`). Returns pools grouped by chainId alongside a separately paginated markets list with `underlyingTokenMetadata` embedded in each market. No top-level `tokens` field.

200.description: Returns Pool data for all listed pools.

stable.summary: accept-version: stable — paginated pools with embedded markets + top-level tokens array

next.summary: accept-version: next — pools grouped by chainId, markets paginated separately

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Array of columns to order results. Default sort is descending. If '+' is prepended to a column it will be sorted ascending.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Array of columns to order results. Default sort is descending. If '+' is prepended to a column it will be sorted ascending.

get.description: Get voter details for a given proposal.

200.description: Pagination object with paginated voter activity and a summary of proposal votes.

parameters.name: proposalId
parameters.description: Proposal Id for fetching a detailed proposal

get.description: Returns paginated array of proposals. It takes an optional array of proposal ids to filter by.

MarketsStableResponse.description: Response when using accept-version: stable. chainId is required. Returns a top-level tokens array alongside the paginated market list.

tokens.description: Token metadata (with prices) for every underlying and reward token referenced in result. Not present in the next version — token metadata is embedded inside each market as underlyingTokenMetadata instead.

MarketsNextResponse.description: Response when using accept-version: next. chainId is optional. Token metadata is embedded inside each market as underlyingTokenMetadata. Supports accountAddress for Prime APY data.

result.description: Markets with underlyingTokenMetadata (and tokenPrices) embedded in each item. No separate tokens field.

PoolsStableResponse.description: Response when using accept-version: stable. chainId is required. Pools include embedded markets. A top-level tokens array carries all token metadata.

result.description: Pools with embedded markets (isListed only) and eModeGroups.

tokens.description: Token metadata (with prices) for every underlying and reward token referenced in result. Not present in the next version — token metadata is embedded inside each market as underlyingTokenMetadata instead.

PoolsNextResponse.description: Response when using accept-version: next. chainId is optional and accepts a JSON array string for multi-chain queries (e.g. `["56","1"]`). Pools are grouped by chainId. Markets are returned separately with underlyingTokenMetadata embedded.

pools.description: All matching pools keyed by chainId. Each pool includes eModeGroups but not markets (markets are in the separate markets field).

markets.description: Paginated market list across all requested chains. Each market has underlyingTokenMetadata embedded.

eModeSettings.description: E-mode settings for this market. Present in the stable /pools response only.

underlyingTokenMetadata.description: Embedded token metadata with price data. Present in the next version response only.

markets.description: Embedded markets. Present in the stable /pools response only.
